name: @inkweld/presence
description: Shared presence protocol (binary lib0 framing, types, encoders/decoders) multiplexed onto the Inkweld elements Yjs WebSocket.
//deps: lib0 is a peerDependency (host MUST provide it). It is also a devDependency so this package's own typecheck/tests can resolve it. Mirrors the @inkweld/prosemirror policy. yjs is NOT required at runtime by this package — RelativePosition handling lives in the consumer.
